category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT device compliance comparison for export from China to Moldova.

title.en: China-to-Moldova Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (ANRCETI / ATIC)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入摩尔多瓦：ANRCETI / ATIC合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入摩爾多瓦：ANRCETI / ATIC合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Moldovan ANRCETI type approval and ATIC conformity requirements under Law 235/2011 on technical regulations and the EU Association Agreement (DCFTA), covering radio type approval (DS — Declaration of Conformity under Moldovan technical regulations), EMC (SM standards mirroring EN/ETSI via ATIC), electrical safety (220–230 V / 50 Hz, Type C/F), local Moldovan importer or authorised representative obligation, and cybersecurity / personal data obligations under Law 133/2011.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与摩尔多瓦《技术法规第235/2011号法》及欧盟联系协议（DCFTA）下ANRCETI型式核准及ATIC符合性要求的差距对照，涵盖无线电型式核准（DS——摩尔多瓦技术法规下的符合性声明）、电磁兼容（ATIC实施的EN/ETSI镜像SM标准）、电气安全（220–230V/50Hz，C/F型插头）、本地摩尔多瓦进口商或授权代表义务以及《个人数据保护法第133/2011号》下的网络安全及个人数据义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與摩爾多瓦《技術法規第235/2011號法》及歐盟聯繫協議（DCFTA）下ANRCETI型式核准及ATIC符合性要求的差距對照，涵蓋無線電型式核准（DS——摩爾多瓦技術法規下的符合性聲明）、電磁相容（ATIC實施的EN/ETSI鏡像SM標準）、電氣安全（220–230V/50Hz，C/F型插頭）、本地摩爾多瓦進口商或授權代表義務以及《個人資料保護法第133/2011號》下的網路安全及個人資料義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, ANRCETI type approval, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current Moldovan regulations, applicable SM standards, labelling requirements, and market-entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Moldova.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、ANRCETI型式核准、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于摩尔多瓦销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行摩尔多瓦法规、适用SM标准、标注要求及市场准入义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、ANRCETI型式核准、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於摩爾多瓦銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行摩爾多瓦法規、適用SM標準、標注要求及市場准入義務。

answer_first.en: ANRCETI radio type approval plus a DS (Declaration of Conformity under Moldovan technical regulations) are mandatory for wireless devices sold in Moldova; CE documentation from the EU is partially accepted as technical evidence for the DS filing but does not replace it. CCC and FCC are not recognised. SM standards (mirroring EN/ETSI) apply for radio and EMC testing via ATIC market surveillance. Electrical safety requirements follow 220–230 V / 50 Hz / Type C/F (SM equivalents of IEC 62368-1). An importer or authorised representative registered with ANRCETI is required. Moldova's Law 133/2011 on Personal Data Protection (a GDPR-equivalent) applies to IoT devices that collect or process personal data. These are the major compliance gaps compared with Chinese SRRC radio type approval, CCC certification, and GB standards.
answer_first.zh: 在摩尔多瓦销售无线设备，必须取得ANRCETI无线电型式核准并出具DS（摩尔多瓦技术法规下的符合性声明）；欧盟CE文件可部分作为DS申报的技术证明，但不能替代DS本身。CCC和FCC均不被认可。无线电及电磁兼容测试适用SM标准（EN/ETSI镜像），由ATIC负责市场监督。电气安全要求遵循220–230V/50Hz/C/F型插头（IEC 62368-1的SM对应标准）。须在ANRCETI注册的本地进口商或授权代表。摩尔多瓦《个人数据保护法第133/2011号》（相当于GDPR）适用于收集或处理个人数据的物联网设备。以上为与中国SRRC无线电型式核准、CCC认证及GB标准相比的主要合规差距。
answer_first.zht: 在摩爾多瓦銷售無線裝置，必須取得ANRCETI無線電型式核准並出具DS（摩爾多瓦技術法規下的符合性聲明）；歐盟CE文件可部分作為DS申報的技術證明，但不能替代DS本身。CCC和FCC均不被認可。無線電及電磁相容測試適用SM標準（EN/ETSI鏡像），由ATIC負責市場監督。電氣安全要求遵循220–230V/50Hz/C/F型插頭（IEC 62368-1的SM對應標準）。須在ANRCETI登記的本地進口商或授權代表。摩爾多瓦《個人資料保護法第133/2011號》（相當於GDPR）適用於收集或處理個人資料的物聯網裝置。以上為與中國SRRC無線電型式核准、CCC認證及GB標準相比的主要合規差距。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or on major ANRCETI / ATIC regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. human_reviewed requires named reviewer sign-off.
